Réia vs the field — at a glance

Three questions, three answers. Maroon = you, grey = the typical direct rival, gold = the best-in-class benchmark.
How much are you publishing?
Réia (you)67
Typical rival75
Best · Brilliant Earth209
You publish the least of the serious players. Scale to a steady weekly cadence.
How much of it works? (win-rate)
Réia (you)19%
Typical rival45%
Best · Brilliant Earth100%
Win-rate = % of ads still live after 2 weeks. Let winners run instead of churning.
How many distinct creatives?
Réia (you)36
Typical rival37
Best · Brilliant Earth141
Variety of ideas in-market. You need more shots on goal, not more repeats.

Overview — every brand at a glance

How to read this: the Live placements bar shows raw ad volume; Creatives is the distinct-ad count after we collapse duplicates; the Status mix bar shows what share is Winning (2+ wks), Short-run (1–2 wks) or Newly (<1 wk); Win-rate = % surviving 2+ weeks. Click any brand to jump to its creatives.
Live placements = every active adCreatives = distinct ads (duplicates collapsed)Winning 2+wk Short-run 1–2wk Newly <1wk

Where Réia lags: you run 67 live placements (13 winning, 19% win-rate). Direct rivals run far more — Brilliant Earth 209, House of Quadri 193, GIVA 186. Benchmark Brilliant Earth runs 209 at ~100% win-rate. The gap is volume + consistency, not strategy. You are already in the right themes — scale a steady cadence and let winners run.

Each thumbnail is one distinct creative — a x N badge means that creative is running as N separate placements. Click a thumbnail to open the live ad.

Personas

PersonaWhoOutput target
P1 · The Planner Groom25-34, about to propose, anxious about getting it right, time-poorLead — consult bookings
P2 · The Design-Led Bride24-32, wants a ring that's hers, values transparency & EF/VVSConsideration — custom enquiry
P3 · The Self-Purchaserworking woman 26-42, buys for herself, everyday luxuryConversion — everyday pieces
P4 · The Value Seekerprice-aware, needs to justify lab-grown, compares brandsConsideration — objection handling
P5 · The Sceptical Familyparents/traditionalists, wary of lab-grownAwareness/Trust — education
54 brands · 5135 live placements · 28 brands re-scraped uncapped (run15) · 5404 thumbnails. Identical creatives collapsed via Meta collation_id (x N badge). Thumbnails load from Meta CDN with no-referrer. EF/VVS floor applies to all Réia creative.
